arts.ttl: Will Man City be relegated? What we know about potential Premier League expulsion
arts.sum: The Premier League handbook outlines the hurdles that must be jumped should a guilty verdict be passed and MEN Sport breaks it down for you.

arts.ttl: I saw Man City chairman's show of unity at Inter game as Premier League charges hearing continues
arts.sum: Manchester City opened their Champions League campaign at home to Inter Milan at the Etihad.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne injury update and Savinho latest ahead of Man City vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Manchester City manager Pep Guardiola spoke about Kevin De Bruyne and Savinho after both went off against Inter

arts.ttl: Pep Guardiola provides Kevin De Bruyne injury update ahead of Arsenal showdown
arts.sum: Manchester City boss Pep Guardiola provides an update on Kevin De Bruyne after the playmaker picks up an injury in Wednesday's Champions League clash with Inter Milan.

arts.ttl: Man City 0-0 Inter: Player ratings as excellent Nerazzuri stifle Cityzens
arts.sum: There was hardly a grand sense of occasion inside the Etihad despite the presence of two of the competition's favourites, and Inter gave the City faithful little reason to ramp up the noise as they produced an excellent first half display. While his proactivity allowed City to break at times, Inter did have joy breaking down his side in the second half.

arts.ttl: Manuel Akanji hilariously reveals ONE issue with Man City's new Oasis-inspired away kit after Pep Guardiola's side debuted shirt in stalemate with Inter Milan
arts.sum: The legendary rock and roll band recently announced the group - led by City fanatic brothers Liam and Noel Gallagher - are getting back together and the club have got in on the action.

arts.ttl: Erling Haaland appears to give x-rated response to Francesco Acerbi after Inter star asked for TWO of City striker's shirts following Champions League draw
arts.sum: Haaland was kept quiet on a night in which he missed out on his 100th goal for the club but he was all smiles during an animated chat with Acerbi after the final whistle.

arts.ttl: What’s the story? Manchester City and Inter serve up poor advert for new world | Barney Ronay
arts.athr: Barney Ronay at the Etihad Stadium
arts.sum: This goalless, tension-free draw raised questions about the new Champions League format and City’s late-Pep vision Well, Rodri was right about one thing. We definitely need a few less games like this one. Welcome to the new world of Uefa expansionism, a competition without structure, designed solely to provide another roll of TV wallpaper, and on this evidence a place lacking some vital degree of tension or shape. The most dramatic moment at a room-temperature Etihad Stadium arrived on 78 minutes. As Inter missed one of several good chances on the night, Simone Inzaghi, their thrillingly energetic manager, could be seen literally on his hands and knees in cat stretch position, beating the turf with his hands, as though performing a steamy 1980s soft rock music video dance, whipping his hair, grinding the knees of his elegant dark suit into the grass. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Man City 0-0 Inter Milan PLAYER RATINGS: Which superstar had a night to forget? Who was almost flawless at the back? And how did Jack Grealish get on?
arts.sum: Pep Guardiola's side lifted the European Cup the last time the two teams met just 15 months ago. And the performance of the Italian champions showed their performance in Istanbul was not a one-off.

arts.ttl: Kevin De Bruyne a doubt to face Arsenal after frustrating night for Man City
arts.sum: City failed to spark as a positive Inter, who created some of the best chances during the game, claimed a creditable draw.
